message:
feat: deterministic system message ordering and MPSC channel fairness

Core runtime improvements for replay-stable shutdown behavior and
fair channel backpressure:

GenServer (src/gen_server.rs):
- Add SystemMsg::sort_key() for deterministic shutdown ordering using
  composite key: (virtual_time, kind_rank, subject_key) where kind
  rank is Down(0) < Exit(1) < Timeout(2)
- Add SystemMsgSubjectKey enum for stable subject identification
- Add SystemMsgBatch for accumulating and sorting batched system
  messages during scheduler steps
- Add conformance tests verifying SYS-ORDER contract and batch
  equivalence with explicit sort

MPSC channel (src/channel/mpsc.rs):
- Replace per-waiter Arc<AtomicBool> with Arc<SharedWaiter> containing
  Mutex<Waker> + AtomicBool, enabling in-place waker updates without
  re-enqueuing
- Switch from wake-all to wake-next-sender strategy with cascade:
  when a sender acquires capacity, it wakes the next waiter if capacity
  remains, preventing thundering herd
- Fix waiter lifecycle: properly remove self from queue on capacity
  acquisition and on Drop, with cascading wake propagation
- Refactor try_recv to use map_or_else for cleaner control flow

Supervision (src/supervision.rs):
- Integrate SystemMsgBatch for deterministic delivery during
  supervised shutdown drain paths

Runtime (src/runtime/):
- reactor/mod.rs: expose reactor state for external inspection
- sharded_state.rs: add shard accessor methods
- state.rs: add state query helpers
- task_table.rs: add task enumeration and lookup methods

Context (src/cx/):
- cx.rs: add context accessor for runtime introspection
- registry.rs: add registry lookup helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
